APPEARANCES- DIANA DELORENZI, TEL. NO. (925) 812-3743, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : PETITIONER WORLDWIDE ASSET PURCHASING, L L C'S Petition To Confirm, Correct Or Vacate Contractual Arbitration Award IS GRANTED.
